title: Submerged
content:

    Where I was wont to preen myself.

    But for the abyss

content:

title: The Edge
content:
I thought to die that night in the solitude where they would never find me...
    But there was time...

title: The Fire
content:
The old men of the world have made a fire
    To warm their trembling hands.

title: Potpourri
content:

title: To The Others

title: Flotsam
Broadway
content:
Light!
    Innumerable ions of light,
    Kindling, irradiating,

    Light that jingles like anklet chains

title: Faces
content:
A late snow beats

title: Skyscrapers
content:
Skyscrapers... remote, unpartisan...
    Turning neither to the right nor left
    Your imperturbable fronts....
    Austerely greeting the sun

title: The Star
content:

content:

title: Dedication (To my Mother)
content:
Let me cradle myself back
    Into the darkness

    Of the cauled beginnings...

title: Dispossessed
content:
Tender and tremulous green of leaves
    Turned up by the wind,
    Twanging among the vines - 
    Wind in the grass
    Blowing a clear path

title: Cactus Seed
content:
Radiant notes
    piercing my narrow-chested room,
    beating down through my ceiling - 
    smeared with unshapen
    belly-prints of dreams

title: Thaw
content:
Blow through me wind
    As you blow through apple blossoms....
    Scatter me in shining petals over the passers-by....
    Joyously I reunite

title: Comrades
content:
Life
    You have been good to me....
    You have not made yourself too dear
    to juggle with.

title: Nocturne
content:
Indigo bulb of darkness
    Punctured by needle lights
    Through a fissure of brick canyon shutting out stars,
    And a sliver of moon

title: The Foundling
content:

    Impatiently

title: Wind Rising In The Alleys
content:
Wind rising in the alleys

    You are full of unspent dreams....

title: East River
content:

    Jaded with monotony of lights
    Diving off mast heads....

content:

title: Electricity
content:

title: To Larkin

content:

title: The Everlasting Return
content:
It is dark... so dark, I remember the sun on Chios...
    It is still... so still, I hear the beat of our paddles on the Aegean...

title: To Alexander Berkman

title: Train Window
content:

    Tubercular towns
    Coughing a little in the dawn...

title: Mother
content:
I

title: A Worn Rose
content:

title: The Ghetto

title: Jaguar
content:

    and clicking tongues...
    publicity of windows
    stoning me with pent-up cries...

title: Sons Of Belial
content:
I

    Old as song.

title: The Woman With Jewels
content:
The woman with jewels sits in the cafe,
    Spraying light like a fountain.

title: Manhattan
content:
Out of the night you burn, Manhattan,
    In a vesture of gold - 
    Span of innumerable arcs,
    Flaring and multiplying - 
    Gold at the

title: Art And Life
content:
When Art goes bounding, lean,
    Up hill-tops fired green
    To pluck a rose for life.

    Life like a broody hen
    Cluck-clucks him back

title: Fuel
content:

title: Emma Goldman
content:

    each proclaiming his own eyeful

title: Promenade
content:
Undulant rustlings,
             Of oncoming silk,
             Rhythmic, incessant,
             Like the motion of leaves...

title: To The American People
content:

    And quietly buried under ground,

title: An Old Workman
content:

title: Altitude
content:

    that has shaken off its dust in low valleys

title: Time-Stone
content:
Hallo, Metropolitan - 
    Ubiquitous windows staring all ways,
    Red eye notching the darkness.
    No use to ogle that slip of a moon.

title: The Dream
content:

content:

title: North Wind
content:

content:

    Anemones

title: Under-Song
content:

title: The Fiddler

title: A Memory

title: Spires

title: After Storm
content:
Was there a wind?
    Tap... tap...
    Night pads upon the snow
    with moccasined feet...
    and it is still... so still...

title: A Toast
content:
Not your martyrs anointed of heaven - 
             The ages are red where they trod - 
    But the Hunted - the world's bitter leaven -

title: Dedication
content:
I would be a torch unto your hand,
    A lamp upon your forehead, Labor,
    In the wild darkness before the Dawn
    That I shall never see...

title: The Legion Of Iron
content:
They pass through the great iron gates - 
    Men with eyes gravely discerning,
    Skilled to appraise the tunnage of cranes

title: The Destroyer
content:
I am of the wind...
    A wisp of the battering wind...

    I trail my fingers along the Alps
    And an avalanche falls in my wake...
    I

title: Brooklyn Bridge
content:
Pythoness body - arching
    Over the night like an ecstasy - 
    I feel your coils tightening...
    And the world's lessening breath.

title: Interim
content:
